title: TUNA PASTA
description: Rich, creamy, and spicy tuna pasta
steps: Add 2 tbsp olive oil and tuna flakes in a sauce pan and cook on medium heat until golden brown.
Remove tuna from the heat and place on a dish or in a container.
Add 1 tbsp olive oil, onion, garlic, thyme, tarragon, rosemary, and chilli flakes in the sauce pan. Cook until the onions have softened.
Deglaze with white wine, let the alcohol cook out.
Add tomato purée, salt, sugar, and pepper. Cook for 15 minutes and add parmigiano reggiano.
Meanwhile, bring 8 cups of water to a boil in a pot and add 1 tbsp salt. Add tagliatelle to water and cook most of the way.
Add tuna from earlier to the sauce pan, mix, and cook for 1 minute.
Taste and adjust for salt and pepper.
Add the tagliatelle and some of the starchy water to the sauté pan, mix, and let the tagliatelle finish cooking in the sauce. Grate some parmigiano reggiano on top while cooking.
Garnish with parsley and more parmigiano reggiano before serving.
note: The sauce can be be ahead of time and heated before adding freshly cooked pasta. DO NOT cook pasta ahead of time.
variations: The type of pasta used for this recipe is tagliatalle, more specifically, nouilles fines. Experiment with other types of pasta!

title: Dholl Puri
steps: Soak split peas 4 hours, drain and grind to paste with turmeric and cumin.
Make dough with flour and water, rest 30 min.
Roll dough thin, spread pea paste, fold and roll again.
Cook on hot griddle with oil until golden both sides.

title: Rougaille Saucisse
steps: Slice sausages and brown in oil.
Add chopped onions, garlic, ginger and cook until soft.
Add diced tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt and pepper.

title: Mine Frit
steps: Stir-fry chicken and Vegetable with garlic, ginger in hot oil.
Add noodles, soy sauce, salt, pepper.
Toss until well mixed and slightly crispy.

title: Vindaye Poisson
steps: Fry fish pieces until golden, set aside.
Toast mustard seeds, add curry powder, turmeric.
Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft.
Add vinegar, water, Bay leaf, dried, thyme, salt, chili.
Simmer 10 minutes, add fish, simmer 5 more minutes.

title: Briani
steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt, half the spices, salt.
Fry onions until golden, remove half.
Parboil rice with remaining spices and bay leaves.
Layer rice over chicken, top with fried onions, mint, cilantro, saffron in water.
Cover tight, cook on low 30 minutes.

title: Gateaux Piment
steps: Soak split peas 4 hours, drain and grind coarsely.
Mix with chopped onions, scallions, cilantro, chili, cumin, salt, baking powder.
Add water to make thick batter.
Deep fry spoonfuls until golden and crispy.

title: Curry Poulet
steps: Heat oil, fry onions until soft.
Add garlic, ginger, curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Bouillon
steps: Boil beef in water with salt, thyme, garlic, ginger until tender (1.5 hours).

title: Roti
steps: Mix flour, salt, water to form soft dough.
Cook on hot griddle, brush with oil, flip when bubbles form.
Cook until golden spots appear both sides.

title: Daube
steps: Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft.
Add tomatoes, spices, thyme, salt, pepper, water, vinegar, sugar.
Simmer covered 1.5 hours until meat tender and sauce thick.

title: Achard Legumes
steps: Heat oil, add mustard seeds, turmeric.
Add garlic, ginger, onions, cook 2 minutes.
Add Vegetable, vinegar, salt, sugar, chili.

title: Boulettes
steps: Grind fish with soaked bread, half the onions, garlic, ginger, cilantro, cumin, salt, pepper, egg.
Make sauce: fry remaining onions, add tomatoes, thyme, chili, water, salt.
Add fish balls gently, simmer 20 minutes.

title: Salade Palmiste
steps: Dress with lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper.

title: Curry Ourite
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, octopus, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Gateaux Patate
steps: Mix with grated coconut, sugar, eggs, milk, vanilla, spices, flour, melted butter, baking powder.
Bake 180°C for 45 minutes until golden and set.

title: Riz Frit
steps: Heat oil, scramble eggs, set aside.
Add soy sauce, salt, pepper, eggs.

title: Mazavaroo
steps: Grind chilies, ginger, garlic, turmeric, salt to paste.
Heat oil until very hot, fry fish until crispy and cooked through.

title: Puri
steps: Mix flour, salt, water to form stiff dough.
Deep fry in hot oil, pressing gently until they puff up.

title: Cari Crevette
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger until soft.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water.
Add shrimp, coconut milk, cook 5 minutes until shrimp pink.

title: Napolitaine
steps: Add onions, garlic, cook until soft.
Add tomatoes, tomato paste, thyme, salt, pepper, sugar, water.

title: Gateau Coco
steps: Add eggs one at a time.
Fold in flour, baking powder, salt alternating with milk.
Bake in greased pan at 180°C for 40 minutes.

title: Chatini Coco
steps: Grind chilies, garlic, onions with little water to paste.
Mix with coconut, lemon juice, salt.
Serve as condiment with curry and rice.

title: Samousa
steps: Cook ground beef with onions, garlic, ginger, spices until done.
Add boiled diced potatoes, peas, cilantro, chili.
Make dough with flour and water, roll thin, cut into strips.
Fill with mixture, fold into triangles.

title: Pain Maison
steps: Dissolve yeast and sugar in warm water.

title: Cari Poule
steps: Heat oil, add cinnamon, Bay leaf, dried.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add chicken pieces, brown all sides.
Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Chatini Cotomili
steps: Mix all with lemon juice, salt, oil.

title: Vindaye Ourite
steps: Boil octopus until tender, cut into pieces.
Toast mustard seeds, add curry powder, turmeric.
Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft.
Add vinegar, water, Bay leaf, dried, thyme, salt, chili.
Simmer 10 minutes, add octopus, simmer 5 more minutes.

title: Gateau Arouille
steps: Mix with grated coconut, sugar, eggs, milk, vanilla, spices, flour, melted butter, baking powder.
Bake 180°C for 45 minutes until set and golden.

title: Rougaille Morue
steps: Soak salt cod overnight, drain, shred.
Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil.
Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, pepper, little salt.
Add shredded cod, cook 10 more minutes until sauce thickens.

title: Cari Zourite
steps: Clean octopus, boil 30 minutes until tender, cut up.
Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add tomatoes, octopus, thyme, salt, chili, water.
Add potatoes, simmer 25 minutes until potatoes tender.

title: Alouda
steps: Boil Agar agar in 100ml water until dissolved.
Pour in flat dish to set, cut into strips.
Boil milk with sugar and vanilla.
In glasses, layer Agar agar strips, basil seeds (soaked), ice, sweetened milk.

title: Lasary Voem
steps: Mix with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, chopped chili.
Serve as fresh salad with meals.

title: Cari Canard
steps: Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, duck, spices, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Gateaux Manioc
steps: Grate cassava finely, squeeze out excess liquid.
Mix with grated coconut, sugar, eggs, milk, vanilla, cinnamon, melted butter, baking powder.

title: Satini Mangue
steps: Mix all with lemon juice, salt, sugar.
Serve as tangy condiment with curries.

title: Cari Bichique
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water.
Add small fish carefully, cook gently 8 minutes without stirring much.

title: Gateau Banane
steps: Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla.
Fold in flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon alternating with milk.

title: Cari Tangue
steps: Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Pain Frit
steps: Mix flour, yeast, sugar, salt, water to form soft dough.
Deep fry in hot oil until golden and puffed.

title: Chatini Tomate
steps: Finely chop tomatoes, onions, chilies, garlic, ginger.
Mix all with salt, lemon juice, oil, cumin.
Serve as fresh chutney with curries and rice.

title: Cari Cabri
steps: Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook soft.
Add curry powder, turmeric, coriander, cumin, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water.

title: Lasary Concombre
steps: Mix with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, chopped chili.

title: Rougaille Boucane
steps: Soak salted fish 2 hours, drain, break into pieces.
Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, pepper, little salt.

title: Ladob Sale
steps: Peel and cut plantains, cassava, sweet potato into chunks.
Boil in salted water with onions, thyme, chili until half cooked.
Add coconut milk, simmer until Vegetable tender and sauce thick.

title: Fricassee
steps: Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook soft.
Add diced potatoes, carrots, soy sauce, thyme, salt, pepper, water.

title: Gateau Piment Mais
steps: Mix with flour, chopped onions, scallions, cilantro, chili, cumin, salt, baking powder, egg, milk to make thick batter.

title: Cari Camaron
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, tamarind, thyme, salt, chili, water.
Add shrimp, coconut milk, cook 5 minutes until shrimp pink.

title: Gateau Pistache
steps: Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla.
Mix in ground peanuts, flour, baking powder, salt alternating with milk.

title: Cari Poisson
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger until soft.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, chili, water.
Add fish pieces gently, cook 10 minutes without stirring too much.

title: Chatini Citron
steps: Remove lemon seeds, chop roughly with peel.
Grind with chilies, garlic, salt, sugar, mustard to chunky paste.

title: Cari Cerf
steps: Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook soft.
Add curry powder, turmeric, coriander, cumin, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water.

title: Gateau Ti Son
steps: Mix wheat bran, flour, sugar, grated coconut, baking powder, salt.
Beat eggs with milk and vanilla.
Combine wet and dry ingredients, add melted butter.

title: Rougaille Saucisse Fumee
steps: Add onions, garlic, ginger, Bay leaf, dried, cook until soft.
Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt, pepper.

title: Cari Brede
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.

title: Gateau Miel
steps: Add eggs one at a time.
Mix in flour, baking powder, salt, spices alternating with milk.

title: Bringelle Frite
steps: Make batter with flour, water, turmeric, salt, pepper.
Deep fry in hot oil until golden and crispy.

title: Cari Langue
steps: Boil tongue 1 hour, peel skin, slice.
Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, tongue, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water.

title: Chatini Ananas
steps: Grind chilies, garlic, ginger with mustard, turmeric.
Mix all with pineapple, salt, sugar, vinegar.

title: Rougaille Corned Beef
steps: Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil.
Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, pepper, little salt.
Add corned beef, mix well, cook 5 minutes.

title: Gateau Gingembre
steps: Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla, molasses.
Mix in grated ginger, flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon alternating with milk.

title: Cari Tripe
steps: Clean tripe thoroughly, cut into strips, boil 1 hour.
Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, tripe, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water.
Add lemon juice, garnish with cilantro.

title: Satini Tamarin
steps: Mix tamarind paste with water to dissolve.
Mix all with tamarind, sugar, salt.
Cook on low heat 10 minutes, stirring.

title: Bouillon Creole
steps: Boil beef and pork in water with salt, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, garlic, ginger 1.5 hours.
Add all chopped Vegetable and leeks.

title: Gateau Cassava
steps: Mix with coconut milk, sugar, eggs, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, melted butter.
Bake 180°C for 55 minutes until golden and firm.

title: Cari Haricot
steps: Soak beans overnight, drain, boil until tender.
Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cumin, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, beans, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water.

title: Pain Rassis Grille
steps: Beat eggs with milk and vanilla.
Fry in butter until golden both sides.
Serve warm as breakfast or snack.

title: Vindaye Poulet
steps: Toast mustard seeds, add curry powder, turmeric.
Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook until soft.
Add vinegar, water, Bay leaf, dried, thyme, salt, chili.
Simmer 10 minutes, add chicken, simmer 8 more minutes.

title: Gateau Fruit
steps: Soak dried fruits in rum 1 hour.
Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla.
Mix in flour, baking powder, salt, spices alternating with milk.
Fold in fruits and lemon peel.

title: Cari Lentille
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cumin, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, lentils, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Lasary Betrave
steps: Boil beets until tender, peel and dice.
Mix beets and onions with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper.

title: Rougaille Thon
steps: Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil.
Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt, pepper.

title: Gateau Farine Mais
steps: Mix cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, salt, spices.
Beat eggs with coconut milk and vanilla.

title: Cari Pois Chiche
steps: Soak chickpeas overnight, boil until tender.
Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cumin, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, chickpeas, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Chatini Bilimbi
steps: Chop bilimbi (or starfruit) roughly, remove seeds.
Grind with chilies, garlic, salt, sugar to chunky paste.
Serve as sour-spicy chutney with curries.

title: Brede Songe
steps: Remove stems from taro leaves, chop.
Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.

title: Gateau Cravate
steps: Make dough with flour, water, egg, 20g sugar, vanilla.
Roll thin, cut into strips, twist into bow shapes.
Melt remaining sugar with butter, honey, cinnamon.

title: Cari Queue Boeuf
steps: Add onions, garlic, ginger, cook soft.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, thyme, Bay leaf, dried, salt, chili, water.

title: Lasary Papaye
steps: Grate green papaya or dice ripe papaya.
Mix with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, chopped chili.

title: Rougaille Z'Andouille
steps: Add onions, garlic, ginger, Bay leaf, dried, cook until soft.
Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt, pepper.

title: Gateau Tamarin
steps: Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla.
Mix in tamarind water, flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon alternating with milk.

title: Cari Chou Chou
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, chayote, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Satini Coriandre
steps: Blend with chilies, garlic, cumin, salt, lemon juice, water to smooth paste.
Adjust consistency with more water if needed.
Serve fresh as green chutney with snacks.

title: Beignets Banane
steps: Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon.
Beat egg with milk and vanilla.
Drop spoonfuls in hot oil, fry until golden.

title: Cari Ti Jacques
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, jackfruit, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Pain Perdu
steps: Beat eggs with milk, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon.
Fry in butter until golden both sides.

title: Cari Palmiste
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, palm hearts, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Chatini Pomme D'Amour
steps: Mix with tomatoes, salt, sugar, lemon juice, oil.

title: Gateaux Avocat
steps: Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla.
Mix in mashed avocado, flour, baking powder, salt alternating with milk.

title: Cari Brinjal
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, eggplant, tamarind, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Lasary Carotte
steps: Mix all with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, cumin.

title: Rougaille Sardine
steps: Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil.
Add tomatoes, thyme, chili, salt, pepper.

title: Gateau Cerise
steps: Cream butter and sugar, add eggs, vanilla, almond extract.
Mix in flour, baking powder, salt alternating with milk.

title: Cari Concombre
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, cucumber, salt, chili, water.

title: Chatini Menthe
steps: Blend mint, cilantro, chilies, garlic, cumin, salt, lemon juice, water to smooth paste.
Serve fresh as cooling green chutney with fried foods.

title: Beignets Giraumon
steps: Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, spices.
Beat egg with milk and vanilla.
Drop spoonfuls in hot oil, fry until golden.

title: Cari Giraumon
steps: Heat oil, fry onions, garlic, ginger.
Add curry powder, turmeric, cook 2 minutes.
Add tomatoes, pumpkin, thyme, salt, chili, water.

title: Lasary Chou
steps: Mix all with lemon juice, oil, salt, pepper, toasted cumin.

title: Rougaille Ti Jacques
steps: Fry onions, garlic, ginger in oil.
Add tomatoes, jackfruit, thyme, chili, salt, pepper.
Cook covered 30 minutes until jackfruit tender.

title: Ramen
steps: Simmer broth with garlic, ginger, soy sauce, mirin, sake.
Pour hot broth, top with pork, eggs, bamboo shoots, corn, scallions, nori.

title: Sushi Rice
steps: Rinse rice until water runs clear.
Heat vinegar, sugar, salt until dissolved.
When rice done, fold in vinegar mixture gently while rice warm.
Cool to room temperature before making sushi.

title: Miso Soup
steps: When water simmers, add tofu and wakame.
Dissolve miso in small amount of broth, add to pot.

title: Tempura
steps: Mix flour, egg, ice water lightly (keep lumpy).
Dip ingredients in batter, fry until crisp.
Make dipping sauce: heat water, dashi, soy sauce, mirin.
Serve tempura with sauce, grated daikon and ginger.

title: Yakitori
steps: Thread alternating chicken and scallions on skewers.
Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, grated ginger, garlic.
Grill skewers, brushing with sauce frequently until cooked and glazed.

title: Gyoza
steps: Finely chop cabbage, salt, squeeze out water.
Mix pork, cabbage, chives, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, pepper.
Heat oil in pan, add gyoza, fry until bottom golden.
Serve with dipping sauce: rice vinegar, soy sauce, chili oil.

title: Teriyaki Chicken
steps: Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, grated ginger, garlic for sauce.
Heat oil, sear chicken skin-side down until golden.
Pour sauce over, simmer until thick and glossy.
Slice, garnish with sesame seeds and scallions.

title: Okonomiyaki
steps: Mix flour, eggs, water, dashi powder.
Heat oil in pan, pour batter, flatten.
Flip when bottom set, cook until done.
Top with sauce, mayonnaise, bonito flakes, nori, ginger.

title: Tonkatsu
steps: Pound pork cutlets to even thickness.
Coat in flour, dip in beaten eggs, press into breadcrumbs.
Deep fry at 170°C until golden and cooked through, 5-6 minutes.
Serve with shredded cabbage, tonkatsu sauce, sesame seeds, lemon wedges.

title: Udon
steps: Heat water with dashi powder, soy sauce, mirin.
Top with sliced fish cake, rehydrated wakame, sliced scallions, poached egg, tempura bits.

title: Katsu Curry
steps: Prepare tonkatsu: coat pork in flour, egg, breadcrumbs, fry.
For curry: sauté onions, garlic, ginger, add curry powder, flour, cook.
Add diced Vegetable, water, soy sauce, Worcestershire, honey, grated apple.
Serve curry with rice and sliced tonkatsu.

title: Chawanmushi
steps: Beat eggs gently with dashi, soy sauce, mirin, salt.
Divide chicken, shrimp, mushrooms, spinach, fish cake into cups.
Steam covered 15 minutes until just set.

title: Takoyaki
steps: Mix flour, eggs, dashi, baking powder to make batter.
Pour batter, add octopus piece, ginger, scallions, tempura bits to each.
Turn with picks to form balls.
Top with sauce, mayonnaise, bonito flakes, nori.

title: Soba
steps: Make broth: heat water with dashi powder, soy sauce, mirin, sugar.
Cook soba noodles, rinse in cold water, drain.
For hot soba: serve noodles in hot broth.
For cold soba: serve noodles chilled with cold dipping sauce, wasabi, scallions, nori.

title: Oyakodon
steps: Simmer dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake.
Beat eggs, pour over, cover, cook until eggs just set.
Serve over hot rice, garnish with scallions and nori.

title: Yakiniku
steps: Mix soy sauce, sake, mirin, sugar, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, sesame seeds for marinade.
Grill over high heat until caramelized.
Serve with rice, lettuce wraps, perilla leaves, kimchi.

title: Natto
steps: Mix with soy sauce, mustard, chopped scallions.
Eat immediately while natto is fresh and sticky.

title: Tamagoyaki
steps: Beat eggs with dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, salt.
Pour thin layer of egg, cook until almost set.
Add more egg mixture, lift rolled egg, let mixture flow under.

title: Nikujaga
steps: Cut beef thin, Vegetable into chunks.
Add potatoes, carrots, dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake.

title: Karaage
steps: Marinate in soy sauce, sake, grated ginger, garlic for 30 minutes.
Deep fry at 170°C for 3 minutes, rest 2 minutes, fry again 1 minute until crispy and golden.

title: Shabu Shabu
steps: Make broth: simmer water with kombu.
Set up hot pot at table.
Each person swishes beef and Vegetable in boiling broth until cooked.
Dip in ponzu or sesame sauce mixed with condiments.

title: Onigiri
steps: Mix tuna with mayo and soy sauce for filling.
With wet salted hands, form rice into triangles.
Make indent, add filling (tuna, salmon, or umeboshi), seal with more rice.

title: Sukiyaki
steps: Mix soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake for sauce.
Heat pot, add fat from beef to grease.
Add Vegetable, tofu, noodles, simmer until done.
Each person dips cooked items in raw beaten egg before eating.

title: Agedashi Tofu
steps: Cut tofu into cubes, drain well.
Deep fry at 180°C until golden and crispy.
Heat dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar.
Place fried tofu in bowls, pour hot broth over.
Top with grated daikon, ginger, scallions, bonito flakes.

title: Yaki Udon
steps: Heat oil in wok, stir-fry pork.
Add Vegetable, garlic, ginger, cook 3 minutes.
Add udon noodles, soy sauce, mirin, sake, oyster sauce, sesame oil.
Garnish with scallions, bonito flakes, pickled ginger.

title: Korokke
steps: Sauté onions and beef, mix with potatoes, salt, pepper.
Serve with tonkatsu sauce and shredded cabbage.

title: Yakisoba
steps: Heat oil in wok, stir-fry pork.
Add noodles, yakisoba sauce, toss well over high heat.
Serve topped with pickled ginger, nori strips, bonito flakes, scallions.

title: Dango
steps: Mix rice flour, sugar with hot water to form dough.
Make glaze: simmer soy sauce, mirin, sugar, dissolved potato starch in water until thick.
Thread dango on skewers, brush with glaze.

title: Chirashi Sushi
steps: Make sushi rice with vinegar, sugar, salt.
Make thin omelet from eggs, slice.
Arrange fish, shrimp, omelet, cucumber, avocado on top.
Serve with pickled ginger, wasabi, soy sauce.

title: Zaru Soba
steps: Make dipping sauce: simmer dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, cool.
Cook soba, rinse in ice water until cold, drain well.
Serve noodles on bamboo mat over plate.
Serve cold dipping sauce in cups with wasabi, scallions, nori.

title: Hiyayakko
steps: Top with grated ginger, sliced scallions, bonito flakes, nori strips.
Drizzle with soy sauce just before serving.

title: Kakiage
steps: Mix Vegetable and shrimp with batter.
Drop spoonfuls into hot oil, fry until golden and crispy.
Serve with dipping sauce and grated daikon, ginger.

title: Tonjiru
steps: Cut pork and Vegetable into bite-size pieces.
Sauté pork in sesame oil with ginger.
Add Vegetable (except scallions), dashi, sake, simmer 20 minutes.
Dissolve miso in broth, add to pot.

title: Omurice
steps: Sauté in butter, add rice, ketchup, salt, pepper, mix well.
Place rice mixture on each omelet, fold over.
Top with ketchup, garnish with parsley.

title: Kakuni
steps: Put pork, scallions, ginger in pot with water, simmer 1 hour.
Add soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, simmer 2 hours until very tender.

title: Edamame
steps: Add edamame, boil 5 minutes until tender.
Serve warm or cold as snack or appetizer.

title: Nasu Dengaku
steps: Halve eggplants lengthwise, score flesh in diamond pattern.
Brush with oil, grill or broil until soft.
Mix miso, sugar, mirin, sake, cook until thick.
Garnish with sesame seeds and scallions.

title: Oden
steps: Cut daikon into thick rounds, parboil.
Make broth: simmer dashi with kombu, soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar.
Add all ingredients, simmer gently 1-2 hours.
Serve hot in bowls with broth and mustard.

title: Yudofu
steps: Put kombu in pot with water, add tofu, heat gently without boiling.
Each person takes tofu from pot, dips in ponzu sauce with scallions, grated ginger, bonito flakes, sesame seeds.

title: Chikuzenni
steps: Add dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake.

title: Hayashi Rice
steps: Slice beef thin, onions and mushrooms.
Add onions, mushrooms, cook until soft.
Add tomato paste, ketchup, water, wine, soy sauce, Worcestershire, sugar, Bay leaf, dried.
Serve over rice, garnish with parsley.

title: Taiyaki
steps: Beat egg with milk, combine with dry ingredients.
Heat taiyaki mold, brush with oil.
Pour batter to half fill, add red bean paste, cover with more batter.
Close mold, cook 2 minutes each side until golden.

title: Daigaku Imo
steps: Deep fry at 170°C until golden and tender.
Make syrup: heat sugar, water, soy sauce, mirin until thick.
Add fried sweet potatoes, toss to coat.

title: Negimaki
steps: Slice beef very thin, pound flat.
Place scallions on beef, roll up tight.
Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, grated ginger.
Sear beef rolls in oil, add sauce, simmer until cooked and glazed.

title: Mizutaki
steps: Make light broth: simmer water with kombu.
Set up hot pot at table with simmering broth.
Each person cooks chicken and Vegetable in pot.
Dip in ponzu sauce with daikon, scallions, chili paste.

title: Mentaiko Pasta
steps: Melt butter, add mentaiko, soy sauce, cream.
Garnish with nori strips, scallions, squeeze of lemon.

title: Katsudon
steps: Make tonkatsu: coat pork in flour, 2 eggs, breadcrumbs, fry.
Simmer dashi, soy sauce, mirin, sugar with sliced onions.
Beat 4 eggs, pour over, cook until just set.
Serve over rice in bowls, garnish with scallions and pickled ginger.

title: Anmitsu
steps: Dissolve Agar agar in boiling water with sugar.
Pour in pan to set, cut into cubes.
Arrange Agar agar cubes, red bean paste, fruit, mochi pieces in bowls.
Top with scoop of ice cream.

title: Dorayaki
steps: Beat eggs with sugar and honey until fluffy.
Pour small circles of batter, cook until bubbles form, flip, cook until done.
Sandwich red bean paste between two pancakes.

title: Shabu Shabu Salad
steps: Blanch briefly in boiling water until just cooked, drain, chill.
Arrange lettuce, Vegetable, beef on plates.
Mix ponzu sauce with sesame oil and grated ginger.
Garnish with sesame seeds and scallions.

title: Spaghetti Carbonara
steps: Fry bacon until crispy, add garlic briefly.
Beat eggs with parmesan, romano, pepper.
Toss hot pasta with bacon off heat.
Add egg mixture, toss quickly, add pasta water to create creamy sauce.

title: Margherita Pizza
steps: Make dough: mix flour, water, yeast, sugar, salt, oil, knead, rise 1 hour.
Make sauce: blend tomatoes, garlic, oregano, salt.
Spread sauce, top with mozzarella, parmesan.

title: Lasagna
steps: Make meat sauce: sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic, add beef, brown.
Add tomatoes, paste, wine, herbs, Bay leaf, dried, sugar, salt, pepper.
Mix ricotta with egg, parsley, salt, nutmeg.

title: Risotto alla Milanese
steps: Sauté minced onions in butter and oil until soft.
Add broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly, letting each addition absorb before adding more, 18-20 minutes.
Stir in bone marrow, butter, parmesan.

title: Osso Buco
steps: Season veal shanks, dredge in flour.
Add tomatoes, wine, broth, herbs, Bay leaf, dried.
Return veal, cover, simmer 2 hours until tender.
Make gremolata: mix lemon zest, parsley, garlic, anchovies.
Serve osso buco with gremolata on top.

title: Penne Arrabbiata
steps: Heat olive oil, sauté sliced garlic and chopped chili until fragrant.
Toss with sauce, torn basil, parsley.

title: Tiramisu
steps: Beat egg yolks with sugar until thick.
Beat egg whites to stiff peaks, fold in.
Quickly dip ladyfingers in coffee, layer in dish.
Dust heavily with cocoa before serving.

title: Caprese Salad
steps: Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
Season with salt and fresh black pepper.

title: Fettuccine Alfredo
steps: Melt butter, add cream, simmer 3 minutes.
Toss with hot pasta and pasta water to create silky sauce.
Garnish with parsley and more parmesan.

title: Minestrone
steps: Sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic in olive oil.
Add tomatoes, broth, potatoes, cabbage, beans, herbs, Bay leaf, dried.
Add zucchini and pasta, cook 12 minutes.
Serve with parmesan, parsley, drizzle of olive oil.

title: Panna Cotta
steps: Heat cream, milk, sugar, vanilla until sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat, stir in gelatin until dissolved.
Pour into molds, refrigerate 4 hours until set.
Make berry sauce: simmer berries with sugar and lemon juice 10 minutes.
Unmold panna cotta, serve with berry sauce.

title: Chicken Parmigiana
steps: Coat in flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs mixed with parmesan.
Fry in olive oil until golden.
Make sauce: sauté garlic, add tomatoes, basil, oregano, salt, pepper, simmer 20 minutes.
Place chicken in baking dish, top with sauce, mozzarella, parmesan.

title: Bruschetta
steps: Slice bread thick, grill or toast.
Dice tomatoes, mix with torn basil, olive oil, balsamic, salt, pepper.

title: Gnocchi
steps: Boil potatoes, peel, mash while hot.
Mix with flour, egg, salt, nutmeg to form soft dough.
Roll into ropes, cut into pieces, press with fork.
Boil in salted water until they float.
Sauté in butter with sage until lightly browned.

title: Pesto Pasta
steps: Blend basil, pine nuts, garlic, salt, pepper.
Slowly add olive oil while blending until smooth.
Toss pasta with pesto, adding pasta water and cream to create creamy consistency.

title: Saltimbocca
steps: Top each with prosciutto and sage leaves, secure with toothpick.
Sauté in butter and oil sage-side down first, 2 minutes each side.
Add wine and lemon juice to pan, simmer 2 minutes.

title: Arancini
steps: Mix cooked rice with beaten egg, parmesan, saffron, salt, pepper.
Make filling: sauté onions, garlic, add beef, tomato sauce, peas.
Form rice into balls with filling and mozzarella cube in center.
Coat in flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs.

title: Cacio e Pepe
steps: Toast coarsely ground black pepper in dry pan.
Cook pasta in well-salted water until al dente.
Mix pecorino with pasta water to make creamy paste.
Toss hot pasta with cheese paste and toasted pepper, adding more pasta water as needed for creamy consistency.

title: Ribollita
steps: Sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic in olive oil.
Add tomatoes, broth, potatoes, herbs, Bay leaf, dried, simmer 30 minutes.
Add beans, kale, cabbage, simmer 20 minutes.
Add torn bread, let soak 10 minutes.
Serve with olive oil, parmesan, parsley.

title: Vitello Tonnato
steps: Poach veal with wine, Vegetable, Bay leaf, dried, salt until tender, 1.5 hours.
Blend tuna, anchovies, capers, egg yolks, lemon juice.
Slowly add olive oil to make thick sauce.
Thin with cooking liquid if needed.
Arrange veal on platter, cover with tuna sauce.

title: Focaccia
steps: Mix flour, water, yeast, sugar, salt, 40g olive oil.
Press into oiled pan, dimple with fingers.
Drizzle with remaining olive oil, sprinkle with rosemary and coarse salt.

title: Pasta e Fagioli
steps: Sauté onions, carrots, celery, garlic in olive oil.
Add beans, tomatoes, broth, rosemary, Bay leaf, dried.
Serve with olive oil, parmesan, parsley.

title: Carbonara di Zucchine
steps: Sauté with garlic in olive oil until tender.
Beat eggs with pecorino, parmesan, pepper.
Toss hot pasta with zucchini off heat.
Add pasta water to create creamy sauce.
Garnish with torn mint and basil.

title: Sfogliatelle
steps: Make dough: mix flour, water, salt, knead until smooth.
Roll very thin, brush with melted lard, roll up, chill.
Make filling: mix ricotta, sugar, eggs, semolina, orange zest, vanilla, cinnamon, candied fruit.
Slice dough, shape into cones, fill.

title: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
steps: Heat olive oil, add sliced garlic and chopped chili, cook gently until garlic golden.
Toss drained pasta with garlic oil, add pasta water to emulsify.

title: Eggplant Parmigiana
steps: Slice eggplant, salt, let drain 30 minutes.
Coat in flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs.
Make sauce: sauté garlic, add tomatoes, basil, oregano, sugar, salt, pepper, simmer 20 minutes.

title: Ossobuco alla Milanese
steps: Tie veal shanks, season, dredge in flour.
Make gremolata: lemon zest, parsley, garlic, anchovies.
Serve with gremolata and saffron risotto.

title: Polenta
steps: Reduce heat, cook stirring constantly 40 minutes until thick and pulling from sides.
Serve soft or pour into pan, cool, slice and grill.

title: Pasta alla Norma
steps: Pat dry, fry in olive oil until golden.
Make sauce: sauté garlic, add crushed tomatoes, chili, salt, simmer 20 minutes.
Top with torn basil and grated ricotta salata.

title: Cannoli
steps: Make dough: mix flour, sugar, butter, egg, wine, vinegar, salt.
Roll thin, cut circles, wrap around cannoli tubes.
Make filling: mix ricotta, sugar, chocolate chips, candied fruit, vanilla, cinnamon, orange zest.

title: Amatriciana
steps: Cut bacon into strips, render fat.
Add diced onions, cook until soft.
Add crushed tomatoes, chili, salt, pepper, simmer 20 minutes.
Toss with sauce and pasta water.
Serve with pecorino and black pepper.

title: Zabaglione
steps: Beat egg yolks with sugar and lemon zest in heatproof bowl.
Place over simmering water, whisk constantly until thick and tripled in volume, 8-10 minutes.
Serve warm in glasses with fresh berries.

title: Carciofi alla Romana
steps: Clean artichokes, remove tough outer leaves, trim stems.
Mix garlic, parsley, mint, breadcrumbs, pecorino, salt, pepper.
Place upside down in pot with olive oil, wine, water.

title: Pappardelle al Ragu
steps: Sauté Vegetable in oil and butter until soft.
Add tomatoes, paste, herbs, Bay leaf, dried, milk, salt, pepper, nutmeg.

title: Frittata
steps: Sauté onions, peppers, zucchini in olive oil until tender.
Beat eggs with milk, parmesan, torn basil, salt, pepper.
Cook on low, lifting edges to let uncooked egg flow under.
When almost set, finish under broiler until puffed and golden.

title: Spaghetti alla Puttanesca
steps: Heat olive oil, sauté garlic, anchovies, chili until anchovies melt.
Add crushed tomatoes, olives, capers, oregano, salt, pepper.
No cheese traditionally served with this.

title: Biscotti
steps: Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt.
Beat eggs with melted butter, vanilla, almond extract, orange zest.
Combine with dry ingredients, fold in almonds.
Bake slices 10 minutes each side until crisp.

title: Pasta Primavera
steps: Sauté garlic in butter and oil.
Add asparagus, peas, tomatoes, cook 3 minutes.
Toss with Vegetable, basil, parsley, lemon juice, parmesan.

title: Panettone
steps: Dissolve yeast in warm milk with 30g sugar.
Mix with 100g flour, let rise 1 hour.
Add remaining flour, sugar, eggs, yolks, honey, vanilla, citrus zests, salt.
Fold in raisins, candied peels soaked in rum.
Shape into tall round, place in mold.

title: Pasta alla Gricia
steps: Cut guanciale into strips, render fat on medium heat until crispy.
Mix pecorino with pasta water to make paste.
Toss hot drained pasta with guanciale and fat, pecorino paste, lots of black pepper.
Add more pasta water as needed for creamy sauce.

title: Stracciatella Soup
steps: Beat eggs with parmesan, semolina, nutmeg.
Slowly drizzle egg mixture into simmering broth, stirring constantly to create ribbons.
Season with lemon juice, salt, pepper.

title: Supplì
steps: Mix cooked rice with tomato sauce, ground beef, peas, parmesan, 1 beaten egg, salt, pepper.
Form into ovals with mozzarella cube in center.
Coat in flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs.

title: Pasta con le Sarde
steps: Boil fennel in salted water until tender, reserve water.
Sauté onions, anchovies in olive oil until anchovies melt.
Add tomato paste, fennel, raisins, saffron, pine nuts, fennel seeds.
Top with toasted breadcrumbs and parsley.

title: Affogato
steps: Place scoops of vanilla gelato in cups or glasses.
Pour hot espresso over gelato just before serving.
Serve immediately with biscotti on side.

title: Pasta e Ceci
steps: Sauté onions, celery, carrots, garlic in olive oil.
Add tomatoes, chickpeas, broth, rosemary, Bay leaf, dried.
Serve with olive oil, parmesan, parsley.

title: Bistecca alla Fiorentina
steps: Rub with olive oil, crushed garlic, rosemary.
Season generously with coarse salt and cracked black pepper.
Grill over very high heat 5-7 minutes per side for rare to medium-rare.
Slice thick, drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.

title: Torta Caprese
steps: Beat eggs with sugar until thick and pale.
Fold in melted chocolate, ground almonds, vanilla, amaretto, salt.
Dust with powdered sugar before serving.

title: Weetabix Original Breakfast
steps: Pour Candy Up milk over cereal.
Top with Kramsi cereal for crunch.

title: Weetabix Protein Breakfast
steps: Mix Weetabix Protein biscuit in bowl.
Pour Candy Up milk over cereal.
Top with Kramsi cereal for crunch.

title: Cheese and Jam Sandwich
steps: Add jam on half of the buttered side.
Place cheese slice on the other half.
Fold bread in half or serve open-faced.
